notes: v0.16.10 — Animated ship previews everywhere. All 16 ship skins now render LIVE in 3D wherever they appear: shop tiles, COSMETICS picker, hero ship card on HOME, class select profile pill, account avatar, loadout slot. Cockpits pulse, engine ports flicker, AUREATE halo ring rotates with 3 drones orbiting, BASTION COLOSSUS shield wedges sweep around the hex, LANCE APEX probes track around the chassis, CHORUS ZENITH soundwave rings ripple. Even locked / shop-preview tiles animate at full quality. Single shared SubViewport renders the whole atlas — UI cost is one 3D pass per frame regardless of tile count. Windows only.
